chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Appeal No.D-123 of 2021 Present. Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro & Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon. Appellants: Mumtaz Hussain through Mr.Jahangir Khan Pathan, Advocate. Respondent: The State through Shahzado Saleem Nahiyon Deputy Prosecutor General Sindh. Date of hearing: 08.09.2022. Date of Decision: 08.09.2022. J U D G M E N T ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J-. Through this Criminal Appeal, the appellant has challenged the judgment dated 14.09.2021, passed by learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge/Special Judge (N)/MCTC, Kotri in Special Narcotics Case No.47 of 2020, Crime No.138 of 2020 registered at PS Kotri for the offence under section 9 (c) CNS Act, 1997, whereby the appellant was convicted and sentenced for the offence u/s 9 (c) CNS Act, 1997 for possessing 1020 grams of charas to undergo R.I. for three years and pay fine to the tune of Rs.20,000/-; in case of default to undergo S.I. for three months more. However, the benefit of section 382-B Cr.P.C. was extended to the appellant. 2. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/P.S*
